decisionSummary: A non-production advisory helper was implemented and fixture-proven. The helper requires explicit user consent, copies only the selected shader fixture and source-backed Hyprland vertex shader into a private temp directory, runs glslangValidator only against temp paths, captures advisory result data, and cannot approve, block, or bypass write safety. It is not wired into validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, or production compile-aware validation.

sourceBackedVertexPairingRule.rule: Use tex320.vert only when the temp-copied fragment begins with #version 320 es; otherwise use tex300.vert.

recommendedValidationPolicy.summary: The helper may support a future optional advanced UI action, but its output is advisory only and must not control write safety decisions.

compatibilityGaps: The helper runs glslangValidator, not Hyprland's live OpenGL driver, context, extension set, or linker implementation.
Advisory pass does not prove Hyprland runtime safety, visual safety, uniform behavior, sampler binding behavior, or GPU-specific runtime compile/link behavior.
The helper is not exposed in the UI in this sprint.
No production compile-aware validator is implemented.
No official Hyprland non-live screen-shader validation interface was found.
proofUsed: src/screen_shader_advisory.rs implements the non-production helper with explicit consent, temp-copy-only compiler inputs, source-backed vertex pairing, timeout handling, missing-tool handling, advisory pass/fail result capture, and cleanup warning behavior.

tests/screen_shader_advisory_compiler_helper.rs proves missing consent, temp-copy-only compiler arguments, tex300/tex320 source-backed selection, missing-tool behavior, timeout behavior, advisory pass/fail behavior, cleanup warning behavior, and real glslangValidator fixture behavior when the tool is available.
Existing production gate approval report proves decoration.screen_shader remains writable and production-gated.
Report and tests record that compiler checks are not wired into validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS, write allowlist, or row enablement.
proofStillMissing: A non-production UI action model proof exists, but no full GTK file chooser/widget implementation exists for the advisory action.
No production compile-aware validator implementation exists.
No proof exists that glslangValidator output is equivalent to Hyprland's OpenGL runtime compile/link behavior.
No official Hyprland non-live validation interface was found.
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader optional advisory file chooser execution proof sprint: implement visible file selection only if it can use generated fixture/temp files in tests, never read real user shader files in tests, pass only temp paths to glslangValidator, and keep advisory output disconnected from write safety.
